title: anthenantia lanata var. genuina
intro: Anthenantia lanata var. genuina, also known as Woolly Bluestem or Woolly Anthenantia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Anthenantia lanata var. genuina include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as wound healing and skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
